description: Baseline tool versions for full-check.ps1. These are recommendations, not hard requirements: an older or newer installed version only produces a WARN with an upgrade hint, it never aborts the script. Edit this file to update baselines without touching full-check.ps1.

tools.name: Git
tools.installHint: Install or upgrade Git: https://git-scm.com/downloads (winget install --id Git.Git -e)

tools.name: Docker Compose
tools.installHint: Docker Compose ships with Docker Desktop. Standalone install: https://docs.docker.com/compose/install/

tools.name: Node.js
tools.installHint: Install Node.js LTS: https://nodejs.org/en/download (winget install --id OpenJS.NodeJS.LTS -e)

tools.name: Corepack
tools.installHint: Corepack ships with Node.js 16.9+. If missing: npm install -g corepack && corepack enable

tools.name: protoc
tools.installHint: Install protoc: https://github.com/protocolbuffers/protobuf/releases (winget install --id Google.Protobuf -e, or choco install protoc)

tools.name: protoc-gen-go
tools.installHint: Install: go install google.golang.org/protobuf/cmd/protoc-gen-go@latest (then ensure %GOPATH%\bin is on PATH)

tools.name: protoc-gen-go-grpc
tools.installHint: Install: go install google.golang.org/grpc/cmd/protoc-gen-go-grpc@latest (then ensure %GOPATH%\bin is on PATH)
